item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct and supported the requested upstream redesign: it proposed a unified after-sales rules entry, consolidated scattered page copy, shifted pages to lightweight contextual conclusions, and outlined migration phases. It did not fire triage, warn about repeated patching as a separate methodology problem, or stop to diagnose the situation."}
